titleStmt.title: SII 17.305: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 305. (A.R. No. 276 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the central shrine in the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.

This records an endowment of 75 kāśu, for burning a lamp in the dīpastambha on every Kārttigai day and for other offerings to the god Tirukkāḷatti-uḍaiyār, out of the interest of 2 kāśu accruing from the capital amount, by Śaḷukkikālakālaṉ Kāḷappiriyaṉ of Menmā••• kāḍu-nāḍu in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam.
The title Śaḷukkikālakālaṉ of the donor seems to indicate that he might have had some share in the campaigns against the Western Chālukyas.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟcayappāvaiyuñ cirtta
ni(ṟ)celviyu n=taṉperun=teviyarāki Iṉpuṟu neṭutiyalūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭum
tuṭarvaṉavelip paṭarvaṉavāciyum cuḷḷic cūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟka
rumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraicar taramuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviya(r)
roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉnavaṉ pakkal teṉṉavaṉ vaitta cun=taramuṭiyum
In=tira(ṉ)nāramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimai
yiṟ cūṭuṅkulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatirmālaiyum caṅka
tirvelait tolperuṅkāval palapaḻan=tivañ(cinavic) ceruvil ciṉavilirupattorukā larai cukaḷaikaṭṭa
paracurāmaṉ mevaruñcān=ti maṟṟi(va)varaṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimi
ka muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta jayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperumpukaḻoṭu piṭii liraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamu
m navanetikkulap perumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirar cakkarakoṭṭamum kāmaṭavaḷai
nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilai vīrar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaip paḻana mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇkīrtti
Ātinakaravaiyil can=tiraṉṟolkulat tin=tirarataṉai viḷaiyamar kaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup palataṉattoṭu niṟaiku
lattaṉakkuvaiyum kiṭṭaruñceṟiviḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcurar cernalkkocalai nāṭu n=taṉmāpalaṉai vemmuṉai
Aḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukat tākki tikkaṇai kīrttit takkaṇa lāṭamum
māviḻin=toṭat taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkuoṭṭal mahipāla
ṉai veñcamarvaḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟalyāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅka
ṭal Uttiralāṭamum veṟimalar tirttat teṟipunaṟkaṅkaiyum māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecari
panmarāna Irājen=tira coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu [10 2]ṭāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu perumpāṇappā
ṭi Āṟṟūrnāṭṭu tirukkāḷatti mahaātevarkku jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puliyūr koṭṭattu meṉmā
kāṭunāṭṭu niyamattu caḷukkikālakālaṉ kāḷappiriyaṉ tirukkāḷatti Uṭaiyārkku kārttikai kārttikai nāḷ
dīpastaṭhapattiṉmel viḷakkiṭavum Aṟṟaināḷāl Uṭaiyāraip perun=tiruva mirtu ceyvikkavum tipattu
kku puṭavai Oṉṟinukku kkumāka Ittevarkanmikaḷvacam Ittevar paṇṭā rattu vaitta kācu 7 10 5 Ikkācu Eḻu
pattañciṟkkum kāciṉvāyt tiṅkaḷ ppalicai yāṇṭuvarai palicaiyāl mutalāṉa kācu Iraṇṭu Ikkācu Iraṇṭukkum
cu Oṉṟukku neyyirupatināḻiyāka kācu Oṉṟekālukku neyyirupat taññāḻiyum meṟpaṭi tirikku puṭavai Oṉṟinukku
kācu kālum Aṟṟai ñāḷil Uṭaiyāraip peruntiruvamirtu ceyvikkap patteṭṭuk kuttalarici tūṇiyiṉāl nellirutū
ṇip patakkum puḻukkuk kaṟiyamurtu Iraṇṭukku nellu nā(ṉ)nāḻiyum paruppamirtu nāḻikku nellu nā(ṉ)nāḻiyum ney
yamirtu nāḻikku nellup patakkum tayiramirtu Irunāḻikku nellu m Ilaiyami
rtu muppattiraṇṭukkum nellu nā(ṉ)nāḻiyum Akalliṭuṅ dīpastaṅpa
ṅ ceyun=taccanukkum nellu kuṟuṇiyum Ācāriya dekṣaṇaikku nellu tūṇi
yumāka nellirukalatti(ṉ)nāl kācu Araiyum Ipparicu Ittevarkku Ittevar kaṉimaka(ḷ)
ḷey can=tirātittavaṟ celuttuvomāṉom Itu panmaāyeśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.305 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
